---
title: "selfefficacy_for_nutrition_change_sefnc_week_52"
subtitle: "`selfefficacy_for_nutrition_change_sefnc_week_52`"
description: "selfefficacy_for_nutrition_change_sefnc_week_52"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/selfefficacy_for_nutrition_change_sefnc_week_52/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                          | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                  |
|-------------------------------|------------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                       | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                           |
| `center`                      | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                        |
| `sefnc_when_tired_v10`        | sefnc_when_tired_v10         | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling tired. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10).                                             |
| `sefnc_during_crisis_v10`     | sefnc_during_crisis_v10      | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet during or after a personal crisis. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10).                              |
| `sefnc_when_depressed_v10`    | sefnc_when_depressed_v10     | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling depressed. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10).                                         |
| `sefnc_when_anxious_v10`      | sefnc_when_anxious_v10       | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling anxious. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10).                                           |
| `sefnc_on_vacation_v10`       | sefnc_on_vacation_v10        | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet while on vacation. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10).                                              |
| `sefnc_when_busy_v10`         | sefnc_when_busy_v10          | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when they have a heavy workload. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10).                                |
| `sefnc_when_missed_goals_v10` | sefnc_when_missed_goals_v10  | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when they have not met their dietary goals. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10).                     |
| `sefnc_no_support_v10`        | sefnc_no_support_v10         | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when lacking support from family or friends. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10).                    |
| `sefnc_ubusy_schedule_v10`    | sefnc_ubusy_schedule_v10     | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when their schedule is busy or resource- and/or time-demanding. Self-reported by participant. Week 52 (10). |

: Fields in the `selfefficacy_for_nutrition_change_sefnc_week_52` resource.
